Video.summary: Cesar's English adventure ends with an aggressive Klee Kai, a collie mix that hates walks, and a hyper Labrador.
Video.title: Battle of Britain

Video.summary: Cesar helps owners of rescue dogs including a terrier mix that screams and a Belgian Tervuren scared of her own home; Cesar helps a family adopting their first dog.
Video.title: Hounds From Hell

Video.summary: Velvet Revolver drummer Matt Sorum's French bulldog goes crazy at the sight of other dogs; Cesar helps a former therapy dog with aggression issues.
Video.title: Heavy Metal Miles

Video.summary: Cesar helps the lead singer of Rooney with his aggressive pit bull, while writer and producer Paul needs help with his two Boston terriers.
Video.title: Anger Management

Video.summary: A woman who has relinquished the role of pack leader to her Welsh Sealyham terrier; an English mastiff with too much energy; a Tibetan terrier who is a terror on walks.
Video.title: Mastiff Mayhem

Video.summary: A Pointer mix is fixated on pinecones, while an Australian shepherd whines every time his owner switches on the vacuum cleaner.
Video.title: High Anxiety

Video.summary: Problem dogs in the U.K. including two dogs that spent most of their lives in Africa, and a barking Jack Russell terrier mix.
Video.title: Cesar Conquers London

Video.summary: Cesar adopts four puppies and films them living with him and his pack for their first eight months to demonstrate how to raise a balanced dog.
Video.title: How to Raise the Perfect Dog

Image.alt: How to Raise the Perfect Dog
How to Raise the Perfect Dog
How to Raise the Perfect Dog
How to Raise the Perfect Dog
How to Raise the Perfect Dog
How to Raise the Perfect Dog

Video.summary: Cesar brings discipline to four chaotic Chinese crested dogs, an over-energetic mastiff mix and two unruly miniature dachshunds.
Video.title: Jersey Shore Dogs

Video.summary: Cesar helps comedians Skyler Stone, Ralphie May and Paul Rodriguez get to grips with their unruly hounds.
Video.title: Bad Dogs of Comedy

Video.summary: Playboy Playmates, Miss February 2010 is having trouble with her Chihuahua, while Orange County, Miss September 2011 with her terrier pug mix.
Video.title: Playboy Playmates

Video.summary: Young fans Jessica and Rachel join Cesar as he deals with a tiny dog with an outsized personality and a nervous pit bull mix afraid of the sea.
Video.title: Pack Leaders in Training

Video.summary: Cesar helps a disrespectful yellow Lab who causes chaos everywhere she goes and some dogs who are misbehaving at the office.
Video.title: Gracie & Me

Video.summary: A mail carrier learns to thwart dog attacks; two Pomeranians attack each other when left alone; a Swiss mountain dog is aggressive around food.
Video.title: Mail Carriers vs. Dogs

Video.summary: Basset hounds sibling rivalry; aggressive dog; possessive poodle-mix.
Video.title: Dingo Dilemma

Video.summary: A blue heeler/Australian shepherd mix is overprotective of his owners; a school bus severely injures an American Staffordshire terrier; finding a new companion for a French bulldog.
Video.title: Biker Dog

Video.summary: A Great Dane with an aggressive attitude; Cesar helps a shepherd mix recover from the issues developed while living in a hoarding situation so she can be rehomed.
Video.title: Healing the Hoarded

Video.summary: A firehouse Dalmatian; a dog becomes aggressive toward his owners after being attacked by two other dogs.
Video.title: 4-Alarm Fire Dog

Video.summary: A border collie/springer spaniel mix bolts toward small animals; a shepherd mix has a biting problem; a pushy poodle.
Video.title: Mad Maya

Video.summary: A French bulldog fails the doggy day-care entrance exam; three Jack Russell terriers fight one another for their owner's attention; a beagle howls incessantly while on walks.
Video.title: The Howling

Video.summary: An Australian shepherd bites people and lunges at strangers since losing an eye; a hound from an animal-testing lab fears people; a Maltese shows aggressive behavior and relieves itself on the carpet.
Video.title: Sick of Strangers

Video.summary: A blue heeler puts herself in danger chasing her owner's pickup truck; an American Eskimo/border collie mix won't walk; a golden retriever is aggressive.
Video.title: Tire Terrors

Video.summary: British problem dogs including wild German Shepherds, a dog that must be muzzled by court order, and an English cocker spaniel that hates cars.
Video.title: London Calling

Video.summary: Cesar travels to the U.K. to help troubled dog owners with a territorial street dog and a dalmatian whose personality can turn ugly.
Video.title: Horrible Hounds of the U.K.
